creator: pokui@psg.com
text:
Created attachment 253108
update security/headscale to 0.22.3

This update allows headscale to run without requiring environment variables for go. 

It also fixes a bug <https://github.com/juanfont/headscale/pull/1480> where trying to stop headscale will leave the script hanging almost indefinitely with logs saying the database is already closed.
